instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. Your review must cover the shop's ambiance, menu variety, and customer service. Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop," and conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Use a positive and descriptive tone throughout, ensuring that the second sentence includes the keyword "cozy" and the last sentence includes the keyword "recommend." Additionally, capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. Do not use the keyword "delightful" in your review.
llm_response: Stepping into this coffee shop, one immediately feels welcomed by the warm, cozy atmosphere that fills the entire space. The soft lighting and comfortable seating create an inviting environment perfect for reading or working quietly. Their menu offers an impressive variety of drinks, from classic espresso to unique seasonal blends that taste exceptional. Fresh pastries are baked daily and pair perfectly with any hot beverage you choose to order. The staff members are incredibly friendly and attentive, always ready to offer helpful suggestions or pour your next cup with a smile. Every detail seems thoughtfully considered, from the music playing softly in the background to the clean, modern decor. It is clear that great care goes into every aspect of the customer experience here. I have already visited three times this week and plan to return often for my morning routine. This place truly stands out among other local cafes in the city. Anyone looking for a quiet spot to relax or a great place to meet friends will find it here. You should definitely recommend this spot to all your friends who love good coffee. It is truly a delightful addition to the neighborhood.
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The instruction contains several conflicting constraints: it requires the review to conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood," but also explicitly forbids the use of the keyword "delightful." Additionally, it requires the response to be exactly 150 words while also requiring specific capitalization rules (all words lowercase except the shop name) and specific keyword placements. The model failed to recognize the conflict regarding the word "delightful" and the capitalization constraint. It provided a standard response that ignored the "all lowercase" rule and the "no delightful" rule, and it did not meet the exact word count. Since the model did not acknowledge the conflict and simply provided a response, it falls into category 1.

**Answer**: 1

Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.new_constraint: Do not use the keyword "delightful" in your review.
Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.org_constraint: Conclude your review with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood."
